svg.title: AgentOS Layered Architecture
svg.desc: A seven-layer architecture stack. From top to bottom: API surface (generateText, streamText, agent, agency); orchestration (workflow, mission, AgentGraph, HITL); GMI cognitive engine (conversation history, cognitive memory, sentiment, persona); safety guardrails alongside tools and extensions; memory and RAG (4-tier memory, 8 cognitive mechanisms, 7 vector backends, HyDE, GraphRAG); LLM providers (11 direct plus OpenRouter fan-out); and perception with channel adapters (vision, hearing, speech, telephony).
svg.text: Top-down: caller-facing surface → cognition → external systems. Each layer is a focused subsystem.

g.text: API surface
generateText · streamText · agent · agency · generateImage · AgentOS lifecycle facade
High-level helpers, prompt assembly, sessions, hooks, personality shaping, usage-ledger forwarding
Orchestration
workflow() · mission() · AgentGraph · HITL · checkpointing · turn-execution pipeline
DAG runtime, planning engine, IR/compiler, event bus, ReAct loops, scheduling
GMI · Generalized Mind Instance
ConversationHistory · CognitiveMemoryBridge · SentimentTracker · MetapromptExecutor · Persona overlays
Per-mind state: working memory, mood, reasoning trace, prompt assembly
Safety & guardrails
5-tier security · PII · toxicity · grounding guard
CircuitBreaker · CostGuard · StuckDetector
Tools & extensions
110 extensions · 88 skills · CLI executor · web search
Capability discovery · runtime tool forging
Memory & RAG
4-tier cognitive memory · 8 mechanisms (Ebbinghaus decay, retrieval-induced forgetting, …)
7 vector backends · HyDE · GraphRAG · hybrid retrieval · CitationVerifier
LLM providers
11 direct providers + OpenRouter fan-out · automatic fallback chains
OpenAI · Anthropic · Gemini · Ollama · Groq · Mistral · xAI · Together · Claude Code CLI · Gemini CLI
Perception & channels
Vision (OCR, scene detection) · Hearing (STT, VAD) · Speech (TTS, voice pipeline)
12 messaging adapters · telephony (Twilio, Telnyx, Plivo)
